name: Customer Onboarding Pipeline
outcome_goal: Onboard new customer: collect info, verify identity, set up account, send welcome email

jobs.label: step_1_collect_info
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Collect and structure customer information from the signup form submission.

## Expected Output
- customer: {name: string, email: string, company: string, phone: string, plan: string}
- missing_fields: string[]

## Done Criteria
- All required fields present (name, email, company)
- Email format is valid
- Phone number matches expected format

jobs.label: step_2_verify_identity
jobs.prompt:
## Validation Task
Verify the customer's identity and business information.

## Rules to Check
- [regex] Email domain is not a disposable email provider
- [required] Company name returns results in business registry
- [threshold] Identity confidence score >= 0.9

## Expected Output
- verified: boolean
- risk_score: number (0-1)
- flags: string[]

jobs.label: step_3_create_account
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Create the customer account in the system with the verified information.

## Context
- [schema] Account creation API schema
- Only create if identity verification passed

## Expected Output
- account_id: string
- api_key: string
- dashboard_url: string

## Done Criteria
- Account created successfully
- API key generated
- No duplicate accounts

jobs.label: step_4_send_welcome
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Send welcome email to the new customer with their account details and getting-started guide.

## Expected Output
- sent: boolean
- message_id: string

## Done Criteria
- Email delivered successfully
- Contains account_id and dashboard_url
- Getting-started link included
